meta.title: Learn Claude Code
meta.description: Build a nano Claude Code-like agent from 0 to 1, one mechanism at a time

home.hero_subtitle: Build a nano Claude Code-like agent from 0 to 1, one mechanism at a time
home.core_pattern_desc: Every AI coding agent shares the same loop: call the model, execute tools, feed results back. Production systems add policy, permissions, and lifecycle layers on top.
home.learning_path_desc: 12 progressive sessions, from a simple loop to isolated autonomous execution
home.layers_desc: Five orthogonal concerns that compose into a complete agent
home.message_flow_desc: Watch the messages array grow as the agent loop executes

timeline.title: Learning Path
timeline.subtitle: s01 to s12: Progressive Agent Design

layers.title: Architectural Layers
layers.subtitle: Five orthogonal concerns that compose into a complete agent
layers.tools: What the agent CAN do. The foundation: tools give the model capabilities to interact with the world.
layers.planning: How work is organized. From simple todo lists to dependency-aware task boards shared across agents.
layers.memory: Keeping context within limits. Compression strategies that let agents work infinitely without losing coherence.
layers.concurrency: Non-blocking execution. Background threads and notification buses for parallel work.
layers.collaboration: Multi-agent coordination. Teams, messaging, and autonomous teammates that think for themselves.

compare.title: Compare Versions
compare.subtitle: See what changed between any two versions
compare.empty_hint: Select two versions above to compare them.

diff.first_version_hint: This is the first version -- there is no previous version to compare against.

s01.subtitle: Bash is All You Need
s01.keyInsight: The minimal agent kernel is a while loop + one tool

s02.subtitle: One Handler Per Tool
s02.keyInsight: The loop stays the same; new tools register via @Tool and defaultTools()

s03.subtitle: Plan Before You Act
s03.keyInsight: An agent without a plan drifts; list the steps first, then execute

s04.subtitle: Clean Context Per Subtask
s04.keyInsight: Subagents use independent messages[], keeping the main conversation clean

s05.subtitle: Load on Demand
s05.keyInsight: Inject knowledge via tool_result when needed, not upfront in the system prompt

s06.subtitle: Three-Layer Compression
s06.keyInsight: Context will fill up; three-layer compression strategy enables infinite sessions

s07.subtitle: Task Graph + Dependencies
s07.keyInsight: A file-based task graph with ordering, parallelism, and dependencies -- the coordination backbone for multi-agent work
s07.coreAddition: TaskManager with file-based state + dependency graph

s08.subtitle: Background Threads + Notifications
s08.keyInsight: Run slow operations in the background; the agent keeps thinking ahead

s09.subtitle: Teammates + Mailboxes
s09.keyInsight: When one agent can't finish, delegate to persistent teammates via async mailboxes

s10.subtitle: Shared Communication Rules
s10.keyInsight: One request-response pattern drives all team negotiation

s11.subtitle: Scan Board, Claim Tasks
s11.keyInsight: Teammates scan the board and claim tasks themselves; no need for the lead to assign each one

s12.subtitle: Isolate by Directory
s12.keyInsight: Each works in its own directory; tasks manage goals, worktrees manage directories, bound by ID
s12.coreAddition: Composable worktree lifecycle + event stream over a shared task board
